creator: Timmy.Van.der.Hoek@x22
text:
Whenever I try to play this game on my computer that I've installed
FreeBSD on, it tells me that it can't find the program.

Fix: Write a program to play the cardgame Ass, and then write a
port for FreeBSD.  I've done all this, since I know how difficult
it would be otherwise.
How-To-Repeat: 
Tell FreeBSD that you want to play President, and it doesn't do anything.
I think that this is because it doesn't know how to play.  I want it
to be able to play with a nice graphical interface, like on Windows.
